Class SchemaProvider

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.agi.tool.schema.SchemaProvider
public class SchemaProvider extends Object
A clean, focused provider for generating OpenAPI/Swagger compliant JSON schemas from Java types. This provider's key feature is its deep, reflection-based analysis to enrich the schema with precise Java type information, embedding the "beautiful" fully qualified type name into the title field of every object, property, and array item. It correctly handles complex generic types and recursive data structures, and performs inlining to produce a single, self-contained schema object suitable for AI models.
Author:
anahata-gemini-pro-2.5

    private static final com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper
    INTERNAL_MAPPER
    A secondary mapper that respects getters, used specifically for converting Swagger's internal Schema objects which are not standard POJOs.
    static final com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper
    OBJECT_MAPPER
    The centrally configured Jackson ObjectMapper for JSON operations.

  • Field Details

    • OBJECT_MAPPER

      public static final com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper OBJECT_MAPPER
      The centrally configured Jackson ObjectMapper for JSON operations.

    • INTERNAL_MAPPER

      private static final com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper INTERNAL_MAPPER
      A secondary mapper that respects getters, used specifically for converting Swagger's internal Schema objects which are not standard POJOs.

  • Constructor Details

    • SchemaProvider

      public SchemaProvider()

  • Method Details

    • generateInlinedSchemaString

      public static String generateInlinedSchemaString(Type wrapperType, String attributeName, Type wrappedType) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Generates a complete, inlined JSON schema for a wrapper type, but with the schema for a specific 'result' type surgically injected into its 'result' property.
      Parameters:
      wrapperType - The container type (e.g., JavaMethodToolResponse.class).
      attributeName - The name of the property in the wrapper to replace.
      wrappedType - The specific type of the result to inject (e.g., Tree.class or void.class).
      Returns:
      A complete, final JSON schema string.
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - if schema generation fails.

    • generateInlinedSchemaString

      public static String generateInlinedSchemaString(Type type) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Generates a complete, inlined JSON schema for a given Java type. This method is used for generating schemas for tool parameters and simple return types.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type to generate the schema for.
      Returns:
      A complete, final JSON schema string, or null for void types.
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - if schema generation fails.

    • generateStandardSchemaNode

      private static com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode generateStandardSchemaNode(Type type) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Helper that generates a standard, non-inlined OpenAPI Schema as a mutable ObjectNode. This parses the JSON schema string produced by generateStandardSchema(Type) into a tree representation that is suitable for structural mutations.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type to generate the schema for.
      Returns:
      The schema represented as an ObjectNode, or null if the schema cannot be generated.
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - If the generated schema JSON string cannot be parsed.

    • mergeComponents

      private static void mergeComponents(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode target, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode source)
      Merges the 'components.schemas' from the source node into the target node. This method is null-safe and robust against missing nodes.
      Parameters:
      target - The target schema node.
      source - The source schema node.

    • addRequired

      private static void addRequired(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode node, String propertyName)
      Adds a property name to the 'required' array of a schema node. This method is idempotent and ensures that the property name is added to the 'required' array of the node without duplicating existing entries.
      Parameters:
      node - The mutable ObjectNode schema representation.
      propertyName - The name of the property to mark as required.

    • removeRequired

      private static void removeRequired(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode node, String propertyName)
      Removes a property name from the 'required' array of a schema node. If the 'required' array becomes empty as a result of the removal, the 'required' field is completely stripped from the node.
      Parameters:
      node - The mutable ObjectNode schema representation.
      propertyName - The name of the property to remove from the required list.

    • generateStandardSchema

      private static String generateStandardSchema(Type type) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Generates a standard, non-inlined JSON schema for a given Java type.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type.
      Returns:
      The JSON schema string.
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - if generation fails.

    • handleSimpleTypeSchema

      private static String handleSimpleTypeSchema(Type type) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Handles schema generation for simple Java types (String, Number, Boolean, Enum).
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type.
      Returns:
      The JSON schema string, or null if not a simple type.
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - if generation fails.

    • buildArraySchema

      private static String buildArraySchema(Type arrayType, String itemSchemaJson) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Builds a JSON schema for an array or collection type.
      Parameters:
      arrayType - The array or collection type.
      itemSchemaJson - The JSON schema for the items.
      Returns:
      The JSON schema string for the array.
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - if generation fails.

    • buildMapSchema

      private static String buildMapSchema(Type mapType, String valueSchemaJson) throws com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException
      Builds a JSON schema for a Map<String, T> type.
      Parameters:
      mapType - The map type.
      valueSchemaJson - The JSON schema for the values.
      Returns:
      The JSON schema string for the map.
      Throws:
      com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException - if generation fails.

    • createRootSchema

      private static io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema createRootSchema(Type type, Map<String, io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema> swaggerSchemas)
      Creates the root schema object for a given type.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type.
      swaggerSchemas - The map of generated schemas.
      Returns:
      The root Schema object.

    • injectDiscriminatorEnums

      private static void injectDiscriminatorEnums(Map<String, io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema> allSchemas, Map<String,Type> discoveredTypes)
      Surgically injects 'enum' constraints into discriminator properties by reading Jackson's @JsonSubTypes. This ensures the AI model knows the exact string values required for polymorphic dispatch.
      Parameters:
      allSchemas - The map of all generated schemas across the entire type tree.
      discoveredTypes - The map of discovered Java types indexed by their simple names.

    • postProcessAndEnrichSchemas

      private static void postProcessAndEnrichSchemas(Type rootType, Map<String, io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema> allSchemas, Map<String,Type> discoveredTypes, Map<Type, List<Type>> polymorphismMap)
      Post-processes and enriches the generated schemas with type information.
      Parameters:
      rootType - The root Java type.
      allSchemas - The map of all generated schemas.
      discoveredTypes - The map of all discovered Java types.
      polymorphismMap - The map detailing polymorphic parent-child relationships.

    • findAllTypesRecursive

      private static void findAllTypesRecursive(Type type, Map<String,Type> foundTypes, Map<Type, List<Type>> polymorphismMap, Set<Type> visited)
      Recursively finds all types reachable from a given type.
      Parameters:
      type - The starting type.
      foundTypes - The map to store found types.
      polymorphismMap - The map to populate with discovered polymorphic parent-child relationships.
      visited - The set of visited types to prevent infinite loops.

    • addTitleToSchemaRecursive

      private static void addTitleToSchemaRecursive(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema schema, Type type, Map<String, io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema> allSchemas, Map<String,Type> discoveredTypes, Set<Type> visited)
      Recursively adds titles (FQN) to schemas and their properties.
      Parameters:
      schema - The schema to enrich.
      type - The corresponding Java type.
      allSchemas - The map of all schemas.
      discoveredTypes - The map of all discovered Java types.
      visited - The set of visited types.

    • resolveTypeFromSchema

      private static Type resolveTypeFromSchema(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema schema, Map<String,Type> discoveredTypes)
      Attempts to resolve a Java type from a Schema branch, usually via its ref pointer. Parses the schema's ref path to extract the simple name, and looks it up in the map of discovered types.
      Parameters:
      schema - The Schema object to extract the type ref from.
      discoveredTypes - The map of discovered types reachable from the root.
      Returns:
      The resolved Java Type, or null if no ref pointer exists.

    • inlineDefinitionsRecursive

      private static com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode inlineDefinitionsRecursive(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode currentNode, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode definitions, Set<String> visitedRefs)
      Recursively inlines definitions into the schema.
      Parameters:
      currentNode - The current node in the schema tree.
      definitions - The map of definitions.
      visitedRefs - The set of visited references.
      Returns:
      The inlined JsonNode.

    • createRecursiveReferenceNode

      private static com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode createRecursiveReferenceNode(String refPath, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode definitions)
      Creates a node representing a recursive reference.
      Parameters:
      refPath - The reference path.
      definitions - The map of definitions.
      Returns:
      The recursive reference ObjectNode.

    • findRootSchemaName

      private static String findRootSchemaName(Map<String, io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema> schemas, Type type)
      Finds the name of the root schema for a given type.
      Parameters:
      schemas - The map of generated schemas.
      type - The Java type.
      Returns:
      The name of the root schema.

    • getTypeName

      private static String getTypeName(Type type)
      Gets the fully qualified name of a Java type.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type.
      Returns:
      The FQN string.

    • findField

      private static Field findField(Class<?> clazz, String name)
      Finds a field in a class or its superclasses.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class to search.
      name - The name of the field.
      Returns:
      The Field object, or null if not found.

    • getAllFields

      private static List<Field> getAllFields(Class<?> clazz)
      Gets all fields of a class, including those from superclasses.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class to inspect.
      Returns:
      A list of all fields.

    • getRawClass

      private static Class<?> getRawClass(Type type)
      Gets the raw Class object for a given Type.
      Parameters:
      type - The Java type.
      Returns:
      The raw Class object, or null if not applicable.

    • isJdkClass

      private static boolean isJdkClass(Class<?> clazz)
      Checks if a class belongs to the JDK (java.* package or primitive).
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class to check.
      Returns:
      true if it's a JDK class.

    • enrichEnumDescription

      private static void enrichEnumDescription(io.swagger.v3.oas.models.media.Schema schema, Class<?> clazz)
      Enriches an enum schema's description with detailed information about its constant values. This checks for class-level and constant-level @Schema annotations and appends a descriptive markdown list detailing every constant alongside its description, providing high-precision context for AI tool-calling.
      Parameters:
      schema - The Schema model to enrich.
      clazz - The concrete Java Enum class to inspect.

    • getSchemaAnno

      private static io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.media.Schema getSchemaAnno(Class<?> clazz)
      Retrieves the Swagger @Schema annotation defined at the class level.
      Parameters:
      clazz - The class to inspect.
      Returns:
      The Schema annotation instance, or null if not annotated.

    • getSchemaAnno

      private static io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.media.Schema getSchemaAnno(Field field)
      Retrieves the Swagger @Schema annotation defined on a Field.
      Parameters:
      field - The field to inspect.
      Returns:
      The Schema annotation instance, or null if not annotated.

    • isFieldRequired

      private static boolean isFieldRequired(Field field)
      Determines whether a Field is marked as required based on its @Schema annotation. Checks both the legacy required() boolean flag and the newer requiredMode() enum value matching REQUIRED.
      Parameters:
      field - The field to inspect.
      Returns:
      true if the field is explicitly marked as required, otherwise false.
